靠买彩票挣钱的人【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-231552754_58362221<br>vk.com/topic-238137111_59991045<br>vk.com/topic-231239860_59461055<br>vk.com/topic-231188925_58235191<br>vk.com/topic-238147986_58674506<br>vk.com/topic-231552754_58362259<br>vk.com/topic-235289109_59125551<br>vk.com/topic-231239860_59461076<br>vk.com/topic-231213223_58625096<br>vk.com/topic-231211300_59461078<br>vk.com/topic-231188925_58235208<br>vk.com/topic-237892963_58625113<br>vk.com/topic-238137111_59991099<br>vk.com/topic-231239860_59461097<br>vk.com/topic-231213223_58625123<br>vk.com/topic-231188925_58235233<br>vk.com/topic-238137152_58982357<br>vk.com/topic-237848059_59125585<br>vk.com/topic-235289109_59125592<br>vk.com/topic-238165064_58362309<br>vk.com/topic-231212111_59991127<br>vk.com/topic-231211300_59461121<br>vk.com/topic-237848059_59125605<br>vk.com/topic-231188925_58235252<br>vk.com/topic-237892963_58625161<br>vk.com/topic-231239860_59461141<br>vk.com/topic-231212111_59991153<br>vk.com/topic-231211300_59461145<br>vk.com/topic-238137152_58982391<br>vk.com/topic-237849550_59461150<br>vk.com/topic-238137160_59461155<br>vk.com/topic-238147969_59125641<br>vk.com/topic-231211300_59461169<br>vk.com/topi
